pet_notes: Compact whole-body 3D-toy fennec fox named Sirocco: warm sand and terracotta fur, oversized ears with deep navy inner-ear accents, bright amber eyes, a tiny teal utility scarf with a small attached silver code-tool charm; poised, intelligent, approachable; crisp friendly silhouette. Reflect Dubai desert calm and a hands-on software maker's curiosity. No text, logos, shadows, scenery, or detached effects.
style_notes: High-quality soft vinyl designer toy, clean simple forms, strong readable face, the same attached scarf and charm in every pose.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: High-quality soft vinyl designer toy, clean simple forms, strong readable face, the same attached scarf and charm in every pose..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
